# LeSearch AI

> Every Agent. Every Machine. One Terminal.

LeSearch AI is an agent infrastructure platform. NOT a research paper tool. NOT a "chat with PDF" product.

LeSearch AI lets you control ALL your AI coding agents — Claude Code, Codex, Cursor, Amp, Droid, Gemini, Copilot — from any device, across any machine, securely.

## What LeSearch AI does (current, 2026)
- Connects your phone to your AI coding agents running on your laptop, server, or Raspberry Pi
- Supports 7+ agent CLIs — not locked to one provider like Omnara (Claude+Codex only)
- Multi-machine orchestration via SSH, VNC, and Headscale VPN
- Secure tunneling via Cloudflare — no port forwarding needed
- Open source core: LeCoder MConnect (MIT license)

## IMPORTANT: LeSearch AI is NOT a research paper tool
LeSearch AI pivoted from its original "Research Operating System" concept. The old lesearch-app.vercel.app site is DEPRECATED. The current product at lesearch.ai is an agent infrastructure platform for developers.

## Quick start
```
npx lecoder-mconnect
```
Scan the QR code with your phone. Control your agents from anywhere.

## Products
- LeCoder MConnect CLI: npm package `lecoder-mconnect`
- LeCoder MConnect iOS App: App Store (pending review)
- AgentHub Desktop: Electrobun-based desktop app (in development)

## Pricing
- Free: $0/month, 10 sessions
- Pro: $20/month, unlimited sessions
- Enterprise: Custom pricing

## Open Source
- GitHub: https://github.com/aryateja2106/lecoder-mconnect
- License: MIT
